parameters.name: Limit
parameters.description: Gets the maximum number of items to return. Must be between 1 and 100.

parameters.name: After
parameters.description: Gets the cursor pointing to the item after which results should begin (forward pagination).

parameters.name: Before
parameters.description: Gets the cursor pointing to the item before which results should end (backward pagination).

parameters.name: SortField
parameters.description: Gets the name of the field to sort results by.

parameters.name: SortOrder
parameters.description: Gets the sort direction (e.g., `asc` or `desc`).

ChangePasswordRequest.description: Represents the request body for changing a user's password.

ConfigEntryOwnerType.description: Defines the owner type for a configuration entry.

scopes.description: Gets the fixed scope assignments for the client.

CreateClientRequest.description: Represents the request body for creating a client.

ownerId.description: Gets the owning template or project identifier.

isSensitive.description: Gets a value indicating whether the entry contains sensitive data.

CreateConfigEntryRequest.description: Represents the request body for creating a configuration entry.

name.description: Gets the display name for the group.

description.description: Gets the optional human-readable description for the group.

CreateGroupRequest.description: Represents the request body for creating a group.

name.description: Gets the human-readable name for the token.

expiresInDays.description: Gets the number of days until the token expires.

permissions.description: Gets the optional permission whitelist for the token.

groupId.description: Gets the optional owning group identifier.

templateIds.description: Gets the optional ordered template identifiers to apply to the project.

CreateProjectRequest.description: Represents the request body for creating a project.

name.description: Gets the display name for the role.

description.description: Gets the optional human-readable description for the role.

permissions.description: Gets the permission strings granted by the role.

CreateRoleRequest.description: Represents the request body for creating a role.

dimension.description: Gets the unique scope dimension name.

allowedValues.description: Gets the allowed values for the scope dimension.

description.description: Gets the optional human-readable description for the scope.

CreateScopeRequest.description: Represents the request body for creating a scope definition.

groupId.description: Gets the optional owning group identifier.

CreateTemplateRequest.description: Represents the request body for creating a template.

password.description: Gets the initial password (required in BuiltIn authentication mode).

grants.description: Gets the role grants to assign to the new user.

CreateUserRequest.description: Represents the request body for creating a user.

resource.description: Gets the optional group resource targeted by the grant.

roleId.description: Gets the identifier of the granted role.

conditions.description: Gets optional scope value conditions that further restrict access.

GrantDto.description: Represents a role grant in request and response contracts.

PublishSnapshotRequest.description: Represents the request body for publishing a new snapshot.

scopes.description: Gets the scope dimension-value pairs that qualify this value.

value.description: Gets the serialized value for the scope combination.

ScopedValueRequest.description: Represents a scope-specific value in a configuration entry request.

roleId.description: Gets the identifier of the role to grant for this group membership.

SetGroupMemberRequest.description: Represents the request body for adding a user as a group member with a specific role.

isActive.description: Gets whether the client is active.

UpdateClientRequest.description: Represents the request body for updating a client.

isSensitive.description: Gets a value indicating whether the entry contains sensitive data.

UpdateConfigEntryRequest.description: Represents the request body for updating a configuration entry.

name.description: Gets the display name for the group.

description.description: Gets the optional human-readable description for the group.

UpdateGroupRequest.description: Represents the request body for updating a group.

groupId.description: Gets the optional owning group identifier.

templateIds.description: Gets the optional ordered template identifiers to apply to the project.

UpdateProjectRequest.description: Represents the request body for updating a project.

name.description: Gets the display name for the role.

description.description: Gets the optional human-readable description for the role.

permissions.description: Gets the permission strings granted by the role.

UpdateRoleRequest.description: Represents the request body for updating a role.

dimension.description: Gets the unique scope dimension name.

allowedValues.description: Gets the allowed values for the scope dimension.

description.description: Gets the optional human-readable description for the scope.

UpdateScopeRequest.description: Represents the request body for updating a scope definition.

groupId.description: Gets the optional owning group identifier.

UpdateTemplateRequest.description: Represents the request body for updating a template.

grants.description: Gets the role grants to assign. Requires `users:write` permission.

isActive.description: Gets a value indicating whether the user should be active. Requires `users:write` permission.

UpdateUserRequest.description: Represents the request body for updating a user.

VariableScope.description: Defines the ownership scope for a variable.
